diff --git a/docs/learned/pr-operations/checkout-footer-syntax.md b/docs/learned/pr-operations/checkout-footer-syntax.md index 421ff9ebb..7811e7265 100644 --- a/docs/learned/pr-operations/checkout-footer-syntax.md +++ b/docs/learned/pr-operations/checkout-footer-syntax.md @@ -33,12 +33,12 @@ See `build_pr_body_footer()` in `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/gith
## PR Number vs Issue Number
-The single most common agent mistake is using the issue number from `.erk/impl-context/plan-ref.json` instead of the PR number in the checkout command. These are different GitHub entities: +The single most common agent mistake is using the plan number from `.erk/impl-context/plan-ref.json` instead of the PR number in the checkout command. These are different GitHub entities:
| Source | Use for checkout footer? | Why | | --------------------------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | | `create_pr()` return value | Yes — this is the PR number | `erk pr checkout` requires a PR number | -| `.erk/impl-context/plan-ref.json` | Never | Plan issue number != PR number; validation will fail | +| `.erk/impl-context/plan-ref.json` | Never | Plan number != PR number; validation will fail |
```python # WRONG: Using issue number

## Summary
I have successfully replaced "plan issue" terminology with "plan" across all 26 specified documentation files in the `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/` directory.
### Changes Made:
The replacements followed the rules provided: - "plan issue" → "plan" (case-sensitive) - "plan issues" → "plans" (case-sensitive) - "Plan Issue" → "Plan" (title case) - "Plan Issues" → "Plans" (title case) - "plan issue number" → "plan number" - "plan issue body" → "plan body" - "plan issue metadata" → "plan metadata"
### Preserved Items: - "objective issue" remained unchanged (as specified) - "GitHub issue" or "GitHub Issue" remained unchanged (as specified) - Code references like `learn_plan_issue_closed` variable names were preserved in code blocks - All internal code variable names like `issue_number` in code blocks remained unchanged
